A New Age of Collecting Has Set Sail

OPCARDX

Every collection is a voyage.

Chart every card, vault your treasure, know its worth, and battle for glory. OPCARDX is the first all-in-one home for One Piece TCG collectors — and the Grand Line is calling.

BELOW DECK▼
The Captain's Log

Why We Set Sail

Collecting One Piece cards should be effortless. Instead it's spreadsheets, group chats, and guesswork. OPCARDX changes that — scan any card and our database identifies it instantly, the Price Oracle tells you what it's worth, and your Vault keeps it all in order. The most efficient, comprehensive tool ever built for One Piece TCG collectors.

I.

Instant Scan

Point your camera at any card. Identified, matched, and logged to your collection in under a second.

II.

The Database

The most comprehensive One Piece TCG database — every set, every rarity, every variant, always current.

III.

The Price Oracle

Live market value on every card — so you always know exactly what your collection is worth.

IV.

The Vault

Your whole collection in one place — organized, appraised, and showcase-ready.

The Ship · Launching Soon

The Whole Voyage, In Your Pocket

Scan, catalogue, value, and showcase your entire One Piece collection — sailing soon to iOS and Android. The whole toolkit, in your pocket.

I
The Museum

The Collector’s Museum

Every component working together — from the collector header through the cinematic featured exhibit, gallery, and trophy room. The full vertical scroll, end to end.

Collector Identity
Grandmaster rank, Top 1% badge, and museum collection value pinned to the top of every visit.
AR Mode & 360° Rotation
Pull featured cards into augmented reality, or rotate them in 3D space for the full holographic effect.
Share Gallery & Curate
Generate a unique showcase link, or curate exactly which assets appear in your public museum.
Built for Showcase
Every component photographs well — made to be screenshotted, posted, and admired across collector crews.
II
The Dashboard

Smart Asset Dashboard

Real-time portfolio analytics for serious collectors. Net worth tracking, ROI analysis, and an intelligence feed surface the data you need — gainers in green, losers in red, no ambiguity.

Live Net Worth
$1,245,680 with 24h change, a currency toggle across USD / JPY / CNY, and a bullish sentiment indicator.
Performance Analytics
Interactive value chart with 1D / 1W / 1M / 1Y / All ranges, paired with a PSA & BGS grading donut.
Top Gainers & Losers
Large card tiles with set codes, variant types, market prices, and percentage swings for instant scanning.
Intelligence Feed
Colour-coded alerts — price drops, supply insights, market updates, and watchlist hits.
III
The Oracle

Price Oracle Community

Crowdsourced pricing meets expert verification. Vote on cards pending review, build reputation through accurate calls, and watch live slab auctions count down to close.

Pending Verification
A three-way vote — overpriced, fair, underpriced — with suggested value input and proof attachment.
Expert Consensus
A median oracle price with confidence score, backed by the top-tier contributors who verified it.
Reputation & Leaderboard
Top analysts ranked by price accuracy, with earned badges from Junior Scout to Senior Appraiser.
Community Intel & Slab Watch
Hot rumour threads alongside live auction tracking — current bids, countdown timers, watcher counts.
Instant Scan
Point, scan, logged. Your whole haul charted in minutes.
The Database
Every set, every rarity, every variant — always current.
The Price Oracle
Live market value on every card you own.
Battle Mode
Duel other captains and earn your name on the seas.
⚓ First aboard get founding-crew status & early bounties.
The Founding Crew

The Crew That Makes the Difference

What sets OPCARDX apart is who's building it — a world-class collector, a world champion of the game, a bulge-bracket banker, and a world-class AI engineering team. The exact crew it takes to build collectors the tool they deserve.

Global Brand Ambassadors

The Duo

Mackenyu & Taz
